meaning: n.固定设备,预定日期,比赛时间,[机]装置器,工作夹具
examples: It is easy to change a light bulb, sure, but it is harder to change the bulb and its fixture.
The lamp, the fixture, and the room, all three must work in concert for the true benefits of end-users.
The fixture ended in a goalless draw.
Castells have been a fixture of Catalan summer festivals for more than 200 years.
Lokesh Sharma, known as the Bikeman, is another fixture on the Katmandu cycling scene.
